pi_items.source: Task setup scripts reference this path consistently; setup_task.sh calls setup_libreoffice_base_task with /home/ga/chinook.odb

Task description line 5 states 'Platinum: Total Spending > $45.00'; verifier.py lines 156-161 implements 'if spent > 45.00'; Chinook database analysis shows minimum Platinum customer spending is 45.62, no customer at exactly 45.00
Task description line 5 states 'Gold: ... 40 <= Total'; verifier.py implements 'elif 40.00 <= spent <= 45.00'; Chinook database shows Gold tier customers range from 40.62 to 43.62
Task description line 5 states 'Gold: ... <= 45'; verifier.py implements 'elif 40.00 <= spent <= 45.00'; Chinook database shows maximum Gold spending is 43.62

Task description line 5 states 'Silver: Total Spending < $40.00'; verifier.py implements 'else: Silver'; Chinook database shows Silver tier customers range from 36.64 to 39.62, with no customers at exactly 40.00
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice in Chinook database

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, non-synthetic sample music store database from GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database). It contains 59 customers and 412 invoices. The task requires adding a LoyaltyTier column to the Customer table based on total spending from invoices: Platinum (> 45.00) has 5 customers with spending 45.62-49.62, Gold (40.00-45.00 inclusive) has 9 customers with spending 40.62-43.62, and Silver (< 40.00) has 45 customers with spending 36.64-39.62. Database stored at /home/ga/chinook.odb as specified. NOTE: Metadata claim 'Platinum': 45.00 is incorrect; the actual boundary is strictly greater than 45.00, not equal to 45.00.
